scripts.build:api-stack: npm run build --workspace @rp-platform/api-contracts && npm run build --workspace @rp-platform/domain && npm run build --workspace @rp-platform/prompt-pipeline && npm run build --workspace @rp-platform/db && npm run build --workspace @rp-platform/import-export && npm run build --workspace @rp-platform/api
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:api-stack && npm run dev --workspace @rp-platform/api
